theme.en: Packaging and Memory Set AI's Pace

dek.en: The day's strongest signals sit below the model layer: advanced packaging capacity, HBM4 supply, process-node risk production, and tools that shorten the path to manufacturable AI hardware. Policy and CHIPS incentives are still shaping where that capacity lands.
dek.zh: 今天最强的信号不在模型层，而在先进封装产能、HBM4供给、制程风险生产以及缩短AI硬件落地周期的工具链。政策与CHIPS激励仍在决定这些产能最终落在哪里。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: AMD's Mext Deal Targets AI's Memory-Expansion Problem
title.zh: AMD收购Mext瞄准AI内存扩展难题

summary.en: AMD's Mext acquisition points at flash-backed memory expansion as a way to ease the DRAM pressure created by larger AI systems. The strategic point is not just capacity, but tiering: if software can hide latency well enough, systems may stretch scarce and expensive RAM across more inference and enterprise workloads. That matters as accelerator platforms increasingly bottleneck on memory footprint rather than raw compute.
summary.zh: AMD收购Mext，把基于flash的内存扩展推到AI系统内存压力的解决方案之一。重点不只是容量，而是分层：如果软件能够足够好地掩盖延迟，系统就可能把稀缺且昂贵的RAM覆盖到更多推理和企业工作负载。这对加速器平台很重要，因为瓶颈越来越多来自内存占用，而不是纯算力。

title.en: Tensordyne Uses Log-Domain Math to Push AI Inference
title.zh: Tensordyne用对数域计算推进AI推理

summary.en: Tensordyne is pitching an inference approach that converts AI matrix math into logarithmic operations. The attraction is lower-cost arithmetic for workloads where matrix multiply dominates power and silicon area. It is a challenger-chip story, but also a reminder that inference efficiency is being attacked at the numerical representation layer, not only through bigger GPUs.
summary.zh: Tensordyne提出一种推理路线，把AI矩阵计算转换为对数运算。其吸引力在于，当矩阵乘法主导功耗和芯片面积时，可以用更低成本的算术单元完成计算。这既是挑战者芯片故事，也说明推理效率的竞争不只靠更大的GPU，还在数值表示层展开。

title.en: SiMa Adds an Agentic Development Environment for Physical AI
title.zh: SiMa为Physical AI推出智能体开发环境

summary.en: SiMa launched an agentic development environment aimed at moving models onto its edge AI hardware faster. The company says the tool can compress porting work from months to hours, which is material if robotics, industrial vision, and other physical-AI deployments remain software-integration limited. The story is less about a new chip and more about reducing the friction that keeps accelerators underused outside hyperscale data centers.
summary.zh: SiMa推出面向其边缘AI硬件的智能体开发环境，目标是更快把模型迁移到硬件上。公司称该工具可把移植工作从数月压缩到数小时；如果机器人、工业视觉等Physical AI部署仍受软件集成限制，这一点具有实际意义。这条新闻的重点不是新芯片，而是降低加速器在超大规模数据中心之外被采用的摩擦。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC and Amkor Sign a 10-Year Arizona Packaging Deal
title.zh: TSMC与Amkor签署十年亚利桑那封装协议

summary.en: TSMC and Amkor struck a 10-year agreement to build out an advanced semiconductor packaging and test hub in Arizona. The deal extends the U.S. fab story beyond wafer processing into the backend steps needed for AI accelerators and chiplet products. It also ties TSMC's local manufacturing footprint more tightly to a packaging partner that can support U.S.-based customers.
summary.zh: TSMC与Amkor达成十年协议，将在亚利桑那建设先进半导体封装与测试中心。这把美国建厂叙事从晶圆制造延伸到AI加速器和chiplet产品所需的后段环节。它也让TSMC在美国的制造布局与可服务本地客户的封装伙伴绑定得更紧。

title.en: Intel 18A-P Enters Risk Production With 9% Iso-Power Gain
title.zh: Intel 18A-P进入风险生产，等功耗性能提升9%

summary.en: Intel's performance-enhanced 18A-P process has entered risk production, with the company positioning it as a drop-in upgrade over 18A. The reported targets are a 9% performance improvement at iso-power and a 40% reduction in thermal resistance. For Intel Foundry, the node is important because customer confidence depends on turning 18A momentum into a broader, higher-performance platform.
summary.zh: Intel性能增强版18A-P制程已进入风险生产，公司将其定位为18A的可替换升级版。报道给出的目标是在等功耗下性能提升9%，热阻降低40%。对Intel Foundry而言，这个节点很关键，因为客户信心取决于能否把18A的进展扩展成更完整、更高性能的平台。

title.en: TSMC Starts Building a Glass-Substrate Supply Chain for CoWoS
title.zh: TSMC开始为CoWoS建立玻璃基板供应链

summary.en: TSMC is reportedly expanding its supplier work on glass substrates for advanced CoWoS and chip-on-panel-on-substrate packaging. The material could improve thermal behavior versus organic substrates, but mass production remains distant. The signal is that advanced packaging roadmaps are already pushing beyond today's interposer and substrate limits as AI packages grow larger.
summary.zh: 报道称TSMC正在扩大面向先进CoWoS和CoPoS封装的玻璃基板供应商合作。与有机基板相比，玻璃基板可能改善热特性，但距离量产仍有时间。其信号是，随着AI封装尺寸扩大，先进封装路线图已经开始越过现有中介层和基板限制。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Samsung Leans on Turnkey Manufacturing to Win Back HBM4 Share
title.zh: Samsung押注一站式制造争夺HBM4份额

summary.en: Samsung Electronics is positioning its turnkey logic, memory, and packaging strategy as a way to regain share in HBM4. The approach matters because HBM4 qualification will depend on tight coordination between memory stacks, base dies, and advanced packaging. If Samsung can make the full stack easier for accelerator customers, it could pressure SK hynix and Micron beyond raw memory performance.
summary.zh: Samsung Electronics正把逻辑、存储与封装的一站式策略作为夺回HBM4份额的路径。这个方向很重要，因为HBM4认证将依赖存储堆叠、base die和先进封装之间的紧密协同。如果Samsung能让加速器客户更容易采用完整方案，就可能在单纯存储性能之外对SK hynix和Micron施压。

title.en: Micron Wins an HBM4 Supplier Role for Nvidia Vera Rubin
title.zh: Micron获得Nvidia Vera Rubin平台HBM4供应角色

summary.en: Micron has reportedly secured an HBM4 supplier role for Nvidia's Vera Rubin AI platform. That would extend Micron's AI-memory recovery from HBM3E into the next platform cycle and reduce the risk that Nvidia's HBM4 supply is concentrated too narrowly. For the market, the takeaway is that HBM4 is becoming a platform-level qualification race, not just a density roadmap.
summary.zh: 据报道，Micron已获得Nvidia Vera Rubin AI平台的HBM4供应角色。这将把Micron在AI内存中的复苏从HBM3E延伸到下一代平台周期，并降低Nvidia HBM4供应过度集中的风险。对市场来说，关键信号是HBM4正在变成平台级认证竞赛，而不只是密度路线图。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: GPU-Native Mask Rule Checking Targets Curvilinear OPC Bottlenecks
title.zh: GPU原生掩模规则检查瞄准曲线OPC瓶颈

summary.en: A SemiWiki write-up highlights GPU-native mask rule checking as a way to remove a bottleneck in curvilinear mask flows. Curvilinear OPC can widen process windows at advanced nodes, but it also makes verification much heavier than Manhattan geometries. Faster checking matters because mask complexity is becoming a direct constraint on cycle time for leading-edge manufacturing.
summary.zh: SemiWiki报道了GPU原生掩模规则检查，用于缓解曲线掩模流程中的瓶颈。曲线OPC可以扩大先进节点的工艺窗口，但也让验证负担远高于传统曼哈顿几何。更快的检查很重要，因为掩模复杂度正在直接限制先进制造的开发周期。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Software Export Controls Remain Hard to Enforce
title.zh: 软件出口管制仍难执行

summary.en: Politico's item focuses on why software exports are harder to control than physical chip shipments. The policy problem is that models, weights, source code, and cloud access do not move through customs in the same way as lithography tools or GPUs. For AI and semiconductor policy, that complicates any attempt to extend hardware-style restrictions into software and frontier-model access.
summary.zh: Politico关注软件出口为何比实体芯片出货更难管控。政策难点在于模型、权重、源代码和云访问不会像光刻设备或GPU那样经过海关。对AI与半导体政策而言，这使得把硬件式限制扩展到软件和前沿模型访问变得更复杂。

title.en: SIA Backs CHIPS Act Incentives for Coherent
title.zh: SIA支持向Coherent提供CHIPS Act激励

summary.en: The Semiconductor Industry Association welcomed CHIPS Act incentives for Coherent, a supplier tied to compound semiconductors, photonics, and materials used across advanced electronics. The item matters because U.S. industrial policy is not only funding fabs; it is also trying to reinforce upstream materials and component suppliers. Those suppliers can become bottlenecks as AI, optical networking, and advanced packaging scale together.
summary.zh: 美国半导体行业协会欢迎向Coherent提供CHIPS Act激励；Coherent与化合物半导体、光子器件以及先进电子材料供应相关。这条新闻重要之处在于，美国工业政策不只资助晶圆厂，也在补强上游材料和组件供应商。随着AI、光网络和先进封装同步扩张，这些供应商可能成为瓶颈。

title.en: Challengers
title.zh: 挑战者

title.en: Qualcomm-Tenstorrent Deal Talk Puts RISC-V AI Silicon in Focus
title.zh: Qualcomm与Tenstorrent交易传闻让RISC-V AI芯片受关注

summary.en: Benzinga reports that Qualcomm shares are in focus amid talk of a potential Tenstorrent deal. Even as an unconfirmed deal story, the strategic logic is clear: Qualcomm wants more AI compute leverage, while Tenstorrent brings RISC-V processor IP and accelerator ambitions. The report highlights how challenger AI-chip teams are becoming acquisition targets as incumbents try to broaden their silicon roadmaps.
summary.zh: Benzinga报道称，在潜在Tenstorrent交易传闻下，Qualcomm股票受到关注。即使这仍是未确认交易，战略逻辑也很清楚：Qualcomm需要更强的AI计算杠杆，而Tenstorrent拥有RISC-V处理器IP和加速器布局。该报道说明，随着既有厂商拓宽芯片路线图，AI芯片挑战者正成为潜在收购目标。

theme.en: Device Physics Meets Deployable AI Hardware
theme.zh: 器件物理走向可部署AI硬件

dek.en: This week's stronger papers connect materials and circuit behavior to practical compute paths: ferroelectric devices, PIM for LLMs, FPGA/SNN deployment, and EDA models that compress physical-design feedback loops.
dek.zh: 本周更强的论文把材料和电路行为连接到可部署计算路径：铁电器件、面向LLM的PIM、FPGA/SNN部署，以及压缩物理设计反馈周期的EDA模型。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Ferroelectric Gate-All-Around Transistors for 3D-Integrated Electronics and Neuromorphic Vision
title.zh: 面向3D集成电子与神经形态视觉的铁电环绕栅晶体管

papers.authors: W. Chen, D. Tang, C. Luo, et al.

summary.en: The paper demonstrates an all-2D ferroelectric gate-all-around FET aimed at low-power 3D-integrated logic and edge neuromorphic computing. Reported device metrics include sub-60 mV/dec switching down to 25.3 mV/dec, an on/off ratio of 10^8, and mobility of 310 cm2/V/s. The important result is the combination of steep switching, compact logic, and leaky-integrate-and-fire neuron behavior on one hardware platform, though manufacturing integration remains the key caveat.
summary.zh: 论文展示了一种全二维铁电环绕栅FET，面向低功耗3D集成逻辑和边缘神经形态计算。报道的器件指标包括低至25.3 mV/dec的亚60 mV/dec开关、10^8开关比以及310 cm2/V/s迁移率。关键结果是把陡峭开关、紧凑逻辑和LIF神经元行为结合在同一硬件平台上，但制造集成仍是主要挑战。

title.en: Ferroelectric Gallium Oxide Enables Radiation-Robust Neuromorphic Sensing
title.zh: 铁电氧化镓实现抗辐照神经形态传感

papers.authors: K. Xu, Z. Guan, M. Pei, et al.

summary.en: This work reports a kappa-phase Ga2O3 in-sensor reservoir-computing system that combines deep-UV sensing, memory, and neuromorphic computation. The device operates across -270 C to 210 C and under ion irradiation with an average flux of 1 x 10^4 rad/s, while reaching up to 95% classification accuracy on astrophysical-event tasks. It is notable because ultra-wide-bandgap semiconductors are usually valued for harsh-environment electronics, and here they are tied directly to compute-in-sensor functionality.
summary.zh: 这项工作报道了基于κ相Ga2O3的传感器内储备计算系统，将深紫外传感、存储和神经形态计算结合起来。器件可在-270 C到210 C范围内工作，并承受平均1 x 10^4 rad/s的离子辐照，同时在天体事件分类任务上达到最高95%准确率。其亮点在于，超宽禁带半导体通常用于严苛环境电子，而这里被直接连接到传感器内计算功能。

title.en: Temperature-Graded HfZrOx Improves Ferroelectric Capacitor Endurance
title.zh: 温度梯度HfZrOx提升铁电电容耐久性

papers.authors: S.-Y. Zheng, Y.-C. Sun, Y.-C. Kao, et al.

summary.en: The authors use temperature-graded ALD deposition for Hf0.5Zr0.5O2 ferroelectric capacitors to improve polarization and reliability together. They report 2Pr of 39.6 uC/cm2 at +/-3 V, endurance up to 2 x 10^9 cycles, and projected 94.0% polarization retention over 10 years at 85 C. The process angle matters because HZO ferroelectrics need reliability gains before they can move deeper into memory and logic products.
summary.zh: 作者采用温度梯度ALD沉积Hf0.5Zr0.5O2铁电电容，同时改善极化和可靠性。论文报道在+/-3 V下2Pr为39.6 uC/cm2，耐久性达到2 x 10^9次循环，并预测在85 C下10年后仍保留94.0%极化。这个工艺路线重要，因为HZO铁电材料要进入更多存储和逻辑产品，可靠性提升是前提。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: A Low-Power Buffer-Assisted 14T Ternary SRAM
title.zh: 低功耗缓冲辅助14T三值SRAM

papers.authors: S. Haq, E. Abbasian, A. Darabi, et al.

summary.en: This paper proposes a buffer-assisted 14-transistor ternary SRAM cell for low-power storage. Ternary SRAM is interesting because multi-valued logic can increase information density, but stability, sensing margin, and write energy usually become harder than in binary cells. The contribution is best read as a circuit-level exploration of denser memory primitives rather than a near-term replacement for conventional SRAM.
summary.zh: 论文提出一种缓冲辅助14晶体管三值SRAM单元，用于低功耗存储。三值SRAM值得关注，因为多值逻辑可以提高信息密度，但稳定性、感测裕量和写入能耗通常比二值单元更难处理。该贡献更适合作为更高密度存储原语的电路级探索，而不是传统SRAM的近期替代。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: HyPIM: Hybrid ReRAM/SRAM 3D-PIM for LLM Acceleration
title.zh: HyPIM：面向LLM加速的ReRAM/SRAM混合3D-PIM架构

papers.authors: X. Hu, C. Liu, Y. Ding, et al.
papers.venue: ACM Transactions on Embedded Computing Systems

summary.en: HyPIM proposes a 3D processing-in-memory architecture that combines SRAM and ReRAM slices for transformer inference. The motivation is that different transformer-block operations stress compute and memory in different ways, so a single memory technology is a poor fit. The paper is useful because it treats LLM inference as a heterogeneous memory-system problem, while still facing the practical challenge that attention latency can dominate end-to-end performance.
summary.zh: HyPIM提出一种结合SRAM和ReRAM切片的3D存算一体架构，用于Transformer推理。其动机是，Transformer block中的不同操作对计算和存储的压力不同，单一存储技术难以适配。论文价值在于把LLM推理视为异构存储系统问题，但仍需面对attention延迟可能主导端到端性能的实际挑战。

title.en: ReSCom Uses Stochastic Computing in a Reconfigurable SNN Accelerator
title.zh: ReSCom在可重构SNN加速器中使用随机计算

papers.authors: A. A. Fereidani, M. R. Roshanshah, S. Safari

summary.en: ReSCom is a reconfigurable spiking-neural-network accelerator that uses stochastic arithmetic for multiplication while keeping fixed-point addition and subtraction exact. The design supports IF, LIF, and synaptic neuron models in one hardware framework and exposes runtime trade-offs between accuracy, latency, and energy. The FPGA result on MNIST reports 92.80% accuracy, making the work a concrete hardware-efficiency study rather than only an algorithm proposal.
summary.zh: ReSCom是一种可重构脉冲神经网络加速器，在乘法中使用随机算术，同时保持定点加减法精确。该设计在同一硬件框架中支持IF、LIF和突触神经元模型，并提供准确率、延迟和能耗之间的运行时权衡。其FPGA MNIST结果报告92.80%准确率，使这项工作更接近具体硬件效率研究，而不只是算法方案。

title.en: Otters++ Maps Time-to-First-Spike Transformers onto Optical Synapses
title.zh: Otters++将首脉冲时间Transformer映射到光电突触

papers.authors: Z. Yan, J. Mao, K. Tang, et al.

summary.en: Otters++ uses the natural decay of an In2O3 optoelectronic synapse to implement the temporal term in time-to-first-spike coding. The paper then builds a training path for Transformer-style models by linking the SNN computation to an equivalent quantized neural network with distillation. The result is interesting because it converts a device behavior that is often treated as a nuisance into a compute primitive, but scalability depends on device variation and integration.
summary.zh: Otters++利用In2O3光电突触的自然衰减来实现首脉冲时间编码中的时间项。论文进一步通过把SNN计算与等效量化神经网络和蒸馏训练连接，为Transformer类模型建立训练路径。其有趣之处在于把常被视作麻烦的器件行为转化为计算原语，但可扩展性取决于器件变异和集成能力。

title.en: EDA & Hardware Security
title.zh: EDA与硬件安全

title.en: CGNet Predicts VLSI Congestion with Lightweight Multimodal Learning
title.zh: CGNet用轻量多模态学习预测VLSI拥塞

papers.authors: Y. Li, Y. Xia, G. Zhong, et al.
papers.venue: ACM Transactions on Design Automation of Electronic Systems

summary.en: CGNet predicts physical-design congestion by jointly processing feature maps and heterogeneous graphs. The paper emphasizes graph compression and cross-stitch fusion to keep inference light enough for time-critical design-loop use. This matters because early congestion visibility can prevent costly routing iterations, but EDA adoption will depend on robustness across process nodes, design styles, and tool flows.
summary.zh: CGNet通过同时处理特征图和异构图来预测物理设计拥塞。论文强调图压缩和cross-stitch融合，以保持推理足够轻量，可用于时间敏感的设计循环。其重要性在于，早期拥塞可见性可以避免昂贵的布线迭代，但EDA采用仍取决于其跨工艺节点、设计风格和工具流程的稳健性。

title.en: SNN-MLIR Compiles Neuromorphic Models from NIR to Bare-Metal C
title.zh: SNN-MLIR将NIR神经形态模型编译到裸机C

papers.authors: A. G. Gener, A. Roll'on de Pinedo

summary.en: SNN-MLIR introduces an out-of-tree MLIR dialect and a NIR-to-MLIR-to-C bridge for spiking neural networks. The goal is to turn framework-neutral SNN descriptions into a transformable compiler representation that can target simulation and hardware-oriented deployment. The paper matters because neuromorphic hardware needs compiler plumbing as much as new neuron circuits; without it, trained SNNs remain difficult to move across backends.
summary.zh: SNN-MLIR提出一个外部MLIR方言，以及面向脉冲神经网络的NIR到MLIR再到C的编译桥。目标是把框架中立的SNN描述转化为可变换的编译器表示，同时服务仿真和面向硬件的部署。这篇论文重要，因为神经形态硬件不仅需要新的神经元电路，也需要编译器基础设施；否则训练好的SNN很难跨后端迁移。

title.en: GRAFT Attacks GNN-Based Hardware Security with Function-Preserving Graphlets
title.zh: GRAFT用功能保持graphlet攻击基于GNN的硬件安全系统

papers.authors: S. K. Abharian, S. M. P. Dinakarrao

summary.en: GRAFT studies backdoor attacks against GNN-based hardware-security detectors by embedding graphlet triggers at RTL or gate level while preserving circuit function. That makes the attack more realistic than arbitrary subgraph triggers, because the modified circuit can still behave correctly. The result is a warning for ML-assisted Trojan and IP-theft detection: model accuracy is not enough if the detector can be steered by structure-preserving triggers.
summary.zh: GRAFT研究针对基于GNN的硬件安全检测器的后门攻击，通过在RTL或门级嵌入graphlet触发器，同时保持电路功能不变。与任意子图触发器相比，这让攻击更现实，因为被修改的电路仍可正确运行。其结果提醒ML辅助的木马和IP盗用检测：如果检测器可被保持结构功能的触发器操纵，单纯模型准确率并不足够。
